narrative:
Montgomery Twp township has 6,316 registered voters, with 68.6% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 8.2% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 23.2%, a pronounced Democratic lean of 15.0 percentage points.
